creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Created attachment 202751
gopass_excl_i386.diff

The last commit before the release of the last version removed i386 compatibility (https://github.com/gopasspw/gopass/commit/e2a571e518d162a564d291496999e337180a38d3).
Mark the port not for i386 to reflect that and stop pkg-fallout errors.

I haven't bumped the portrevision as nothing changes for already build packages.
